nasb.text: Then heaven and earth and all that is in them Will shout for joy over Babylon, For the destroyers will come to her from the north,” Declares the Lord.

esv.text: Then the heavens and the earth, and all that is in them, shall sing for joy over Babylon, for the destroyers shall come against them out of the north, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: 那時天地和其中的一切， 都必因巴比倫的傾覆歡呼， 因為行毀滅的要從北方來攻擊她。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 毁灭者要从北方前来攻击巴比伦， 那时天地万物都要因巴比伦的灭亡而欢呼。 这是耶和华说的。
